sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Roar Attack (Cub Form)
special_mechanics.description: Simba's roar consumes a replenishable meter and can be used to stun enemies or solve puzzles

special_mechanics.name: Jump Attack (Cub Form)
special_mechanics.description: Cub Simba mainly defeats enemies by jumping on them

special_mechanics.name: Combat Moves (Adult Form)
special_mechanics.description: Adult Simba gains access to various combat moves including scratching, mauling, and throws

tier_notes: T2 data - No quantitative physics parameters documented. Available sources contain gameplay mechanics and development history but lack specific movement physics values. Game features two character states (cub and adult) with different mechanics.
